This LTL property states that whenever the autopilot is in STANDBY mode and a failure occurs (apfail), then in the next time step, the autopilot will be in MANEUVER mode.  The LTL property uses a combination of atomic propositions and logical operators to express this requirement.  The atomic proposition "state_is_STANDBY" indicates that the autopilot is in STANDBY mode.  The atomic proposition "apfail" indicates that a failure has occurred.  The atomic proposition "state_is_MANEUVER" indicates that the autopilot is in MANEUVER mode.  The LTL operator "X" indicates that the following proposition is true in the next time step.  The LTL operator "->" indicates implication: if the proposition before the operator is true, then the proposition after the operator must also be true.
